text.div:
Generated Narrative: StructureDefinition sdc-valueset

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
ValueSet C0..*Profile_R5_ValueSet_R4A set of codes drawn from one or more code systems
Constraints: sdc-2, sdc-3
Slices for extension Content/Rules for all slices
extension:versionAlgorithm S0..1ArtifactVersionAlgorithm(5.2.0)How to compare versions
Slices for modifierExtension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
modifierExtension:rendering-criticalExtension S0..*canonical()Extension that must be supported
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/sdc/StructureDefinition/sdc-rendering-criticalExtension
url S0..1uriCanonical identifier for this value set, represented as a URI (globally unique)
version S0..1stringBusiness version of the value set
status S1..1codedraft | active | retired | unknown
experimental S0..1booleanFor testing purposes, not real usage
date S0..1dateTimeDate last changed
description S0..1markdownNatural language description of the value set
immutable S1..1booleanIndicates whether or not any change to the content logical definition may occur
compose S0..1BackboneElementContent logical definition of the value set (CLD)
lockedDate S0..1dateFixed date for references with no specified version (transitive)
inactive S0..1booleanWhether inactive codes are in the value set
include S1..*BackboneElementInclude one or more codes from a code system or other value set(s)
system S0..1uriThe system the codes come from
version S0..1stringSpecific version of the code system referred to
concept S0..*BackboneElementA concept defined in the system
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:conceptLabel S0..1(Complex)E.g. "(a)", "1.", etc.
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/valueset-label
value[x]
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:code-renderingStyle 0..1stringHtml style value
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-style
extension:code-markdown 0..1markdownString equivalent with markdown
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-markdown
extension:code-xhtml 0..1stringString equivalent with html markup
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-xhtml
extension:conceptConceptOrder S0..1integerAppearance order for user selection
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/valueset-conceptOrder
code S1..1codeCode or expression from system
display S0..1stringText to display for this code for this value set in this valueset
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:codeDisplay-renderingStyle 0..1stringHtml style value
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-style
extension:codeDisplay-markdown 0..1markdownString equivalent with markdown
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-markdown
extension:codeDisplay-xhtml 0..1stringString equivalent with html markup
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-xhtml
designation
Slices for extension Content/Rules for all slices
extension:designation-renderingStyle 0..1stringHtml style value
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-style
extension:designation-markdown 0..1markdownString equivalent with markdown
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-markdown
extension:designation-xhtml 0..1stringString equivalent with html markup
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-xhtml
filter S0..*BackboneElementSelect codes/concepts by their properties (including relationships)
property S1..1codeA property/filter defined by the code system
op S1..1code= | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | exists
value S1..1stringCode from the system, or regex criteria, or boolean value for exists
valueSet S0..*canonical(ValueSet)Select the contents included in this value set
exclude S0..*Explicitly exclude codes from a code system or other value sets
expansion S0..1BackboneElementUsed when the value set is "expanded"
Slices for extension Content/Rules for all slices
extension:property S0..*0.1.0R5: Additional information supplied about each concept (new)
identifier S0..1uriIdentifies the value set expansion (business identifier)
timestamp S1..1dateTimeTime ValueSet expansion happened
contains S0..*BackboneElementCodes in the value set
Slices for extension Content/Rules for all slices
extension:property S0..*0.1.0R5: Property value for the concept (new)
extension:expansionLabel S0..1(Complex)E.g. "(a)", "1.", etc.
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/valueset-label
value[x]
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:expansion-renderingStyle 0..1stringHtml style value
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-style
extension:expansion-markdown 0..1markdownString equivalent with markdown
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-markdown
extension:expansion-xhtml 0..1stringString equivalent with html markup
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-xhtml
extension:conceptConceptOrder S0..1integerAppearance order for user selection
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/valueset-conceptOrder
system S0..1uriSystem value for the code
abstract S0..1booleanIf user cannot select this entry
version S0..1stringVersion in which this code/display is defined
code S0..1codeCode - if blank, this is not a selectable code
display S0..1stringUser display for the concept
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:expansionDisplay-renderingStyle 0..1stringHtml style value
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-style
extension:title-markdown 0..1markdownString equivalent with markdown
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-markdown
extension:expansionDisplay-xhtml 0..1stringString equivalent with html markup
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-xhtml
designation 0..*BackboneElementAdditional representations for this item
Slices for extension 0..*ExtensionExtension
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:url
extension:expansionDesignation-renderingStyle 0..1stringHtml style value
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-style
extension:expansionDesignation-markdown 0..1markdownString equivalent with markdown
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-markdown
extension:expansionDesignation-xhtml 0..1stringString equivalent with html markup
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/rendering-xhtml
contains S

Documentation for this format

name: SDCValueSet
title: SDC Value Set
description: Defines how ValueSet is used to reflect code lists found in data element defintions and form definitions to be used within the Structured Data Capture standard.

element.definition: Sets expectations for SDC-conformant systems around value set support for representing permitted question answers.

constraint.human: If version is present, versionAlgorithm must be present.
Semver is the preferred version algorithm - package machinery doesn't work well with artifacts using alternate versioning schemes

element.comment: The presence of a sort order implies that sort order is important.

element.requirements: ... Allows support for itemWeight and other key properties
... Allows support for itemWeight and other key properties

element.comment: The presence of a sort order implies that sort order is important.
